## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (mjs syntax + json validity)
- [ ] Conventional Commits message (`feat(...)`, `fix(...)`, `docs: ...`)
- [ ] Added a bullet under `## [Unreleased]` in `CHANGELOG.md` (if user-facing)
- [ ] No secrets, no absolute home paths, no private infrastructure references (public repo)
